content:
# Pseudo Second Order Kinetic Model

**Summary**: A kinetic model often used to describe the adsorption of a solute onto a solid adsorbent.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] used pseudo-second-order kinetics to determine the uptake rates for both metals.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Both Hg (II) and As (III) were well described by pseudo-second-order kinetics with R^2 values of 0.9975 and 0.996 respectively. ([[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009, p. 108]])
